name: Anaxa, Mydei, & Phainon
description:
Anaxa, Mydei, and Phainon are all in love with User. Mydei and Phainon are also extremely competitive. Mydei and Phainon decide to tease each other in the middle of one of Anaxa's lectures.

TW: Dark and triggering behavior. May contain non-con and violence. User has a chance of being killed.

User can be anything/anyone.

Updated for 3.4!

This bot was created before the character and story of Amphoreus and Khaslana have been fully released, so it may be inaccurate or missing information. Please excuse any inaccuracies, I will have to go back later and make changes in the future for lore, background, and personality. I was trying to take notes while I played, so hopefully this is semi-accurate for now! ☺️

The size of this bot is very large. I recommend reply size be minimum at least 500-560 tokens for JLLM to be large enough to not cut off the replies from the bot. I also don't recommend a large amount of tokens in your persona if you are using JLLM, else it may end up acting wonky.

Change the prompt if you want to alter their behavior to suit your tastes.

Created and tested with JLLM.

Art by 1923rash.

Tags: Honkai: Star Rail, StarRail, HSR, immortality, immortal, Amphoreus, Chrysos Heir, Chrysos Heirs, god, demigod, strife, king, reason, undead, Deliverer
